description: Catalog of event-driven encouragement messages for attendees. Stable event keys are intended for application logic; labels and trigger descriptions are intended for admin UI and ops visibility.

completed_day_1.label: Completed Day 1
completed_day_1.template: Welcome to the journey, [Name]! You're doing great. See you on the next day!

completed_3_days.label: Completed 3 Days
completed_3_days.template: [Name], you're doing awesome! Three days in and you're building something strong. Keep it going today!

reached_50_percent.label: Reached 50% Complete
reached_50_percent.template: [Name], you made it halfway! That's amazing. You're doing great, so let's keep moving forward today!

reached_75_percent.label: Reached 75% Complete
reached_75_percent.template: [Name], you're really crushing it! You've come this far, you're doing great, so let's finish strong!

completed_course.label: Completed Course
completed_course.template: [Name], you did it! That's huge! You stayed with it and finished strong. You should be proud!

completed_every_5_days.label: Completed Every 5 Days
completed_every_5_days.triggerDescription: Completed every 5 days with no overlap
completed_every_5_days.template: [Name], you're doing great! You keep showing up and it's working. Let's keep going today!

inactive_3_days.label: Inactive 3 Days
inactive_3_days.template: [Name], it's been a few days. Time to jump back in and get moving again. You've got this!

inactive_5_days.label: Inactive 5 Days
inactive_5_days.template: [Name], it's been a while. Let's get back to it. Just do one day and you're back on track!

inactive_10_days.label: Inactive 10 Days
inactive_10_days.template: [Name], it's time to get going again! Jump back in with just one day. You can do this!
